name: The Granville National Bank
description_short: Community bank offering personal checking, savings, vehicle lending up to 72 months, and mortgage services across Illinois locations.
description_long:
Granville National Bank is a community-focused financial institution with roots in Granville, Illinois, operating at least two branch locations: the main bank at 328 South McCoy Street in Granville and a second location (SheridanBank) in Sheridan, Illinois. The bank positions itself with the tagline "Rooted in Community, Growing With You," emphasizing local service and relationship banking.

The bank offers a range of standard consumer banking products including personal checking accounts, personal savings accounts, vehicle lending, and mortgage lending services. Their vehicle financing program is prominently featured, offering loan terms up to 72 months with rates starting at 5.784% APR (based on specific example terms). The bank states it will finance up to 100% of new vehicle loans for qualified borrowers on new, untitled 2024, 2025, and 2026 vehicles. They also provide mortgage lending solutions for home financing needs.

Granville National Bank distinguishes itself through its community-oriented approach and willingness to finance vehicles up to 100% loan-to-value for qualified borrowers. The bank offers a 0.25% interest rate reduction on vehicle loans when payments are automatically deducted from an active GNB checking or savings account, incentivizing customers to maintain multiple accounts. Their physical presence in rural Illinois communities positions them as a local alternative to larger national banks.

The website provides limited detail on account features, fees, or minimum balances. Rates are explicitly noted as subject to change and qualified borrowers only. The bank appears to require meeting standard credit, income, and underwriting requirements. Online banking is available, but the website itself appears to be newly redesigned with minimal information beyond basic contact details and a single vehicle lending product promotion.
services: Vehicle financing (new vehicles only, up to 72 months)
In-branch service at Granville main location
In-branch service at Sheridan branch location
pros: Finances up to 100% of new vehicle loans for qualified borrowers, eliminating down payment requirements
0.25% interest rate reduction available for automatic loan payments from GNB checking/savings accounts
Vehicle financing terms extend up to 72 months, potentially lowering monthly payments
Two physical branch locations in Illinois (Granville and Sheridan) for in-person service
Offers full suite of banking products: checking, savings, vehicle loans, and mortgages
Rates as low as 5.784% APR on vehicle loans for qualified borrowers with automatic payment setup
cons: Website provides minimal information about account features, fees, or minimum balance requirements
Vehicle financing limited to new, untitled 2024, 2025, and 2026 models only—excludes used vehicles and older models
Loan rates explicitly subject to change and qualify only for borrowers meeting credit and income standards with no rate guarantee period disclosed
Limited geographic reach with only two branch locations in rural Illinois; no indication of online-only account opening or nationwide service
New website redesign appears incomplete with sparse product details and limited navigation
best_for: Illinois residents in Granville or Sheridan communities seeking relationship banking and local service
Borrowers financing new 2024-2026 vehicles who can establish automatic payments from GNB accounts to access rate discounts
Homebuyers in the bank's service area interested in mortgage lending from a local institution
diagnosis: Granville National Bank is best for Illinois residents in or near Granville or Sheridan who value community banking relationships and local service. The main caveat is that the bank's online presence is minimal and vehicle financing is strictly limited to new, untitled 2024-2026 models—used vehicle buyers and those outside the two-branch service area should seek alternatives.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
